function.name: PelvicFracturePlanning
function.description: Performs pelvic fracture segmentation and/or fracture reduction planning on a CT volume. Use this tool when the user wants to segment pelvic fractures or plan surgical reduction and screw placement. The tool can run individual stages ('segmentation', 'planning') or both ('full'). Segmentation produces pelvic and fracture segmentations; planning generates reduction and screw models.

stage.description: Which stage(s) to execute: 'segmentation' for pelvic and fracture segmentation, 'planning' for reduction planning (requires prior segmentation), or 'full' to run both in sequence.

volume_node_name.description: The name of the input CT volume node in Slicer. If not provided, the most recently loaded volume will be used.
